qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the JULIA_EXCLUSIVE environment variable?
qa_pairs.answer: The JULIA_EXCLUSIVE environment variable takes control of thread scheduling away from the operating system and pins threads to cores, often referred to as 'green' threads with affinity.

qa_pairs.question: When might setting JULIA_EXCLUSIVE improve performance?
qa_pairs.answer: Setting JULIA_EXCLUSIVE can improve performance when there is precise information on cache access patterns or when avoiding unwelcome scheduling patterns used by the operating system.

qa_pairs.question: What is a prerequisite for JULIA_EXCLUSIVE to work?
qa_pairs.answer: JULIA_EXCLUSIVE only works if your job has exclusive access to the compute nodes, meaning all available CPU cores were allocated to your job.

qa_pairs.question: Why might setting JULIA_EXCLUSIVE not always improve performance on systems using SLURM?
qa_pairs.answer: Since SLURM already pins processes and threads to CPU cores, asking Julia to re-pin threads by setting JULIA_EXCLUSIVE may not lead to any performance improvement.
